scripts.build: npm run -w @stego-labs/shared compile && npm run -w @stego-labs/engine compile && npm run -w @stego-labs/cli compile && npm run -w packages/stego-extension compile
scripts.test: npm run -w @stego-labs/shared compile && npm run -w @stego-labs/engine test && npm run -w @stego-labs/cli test && npm run -w packages/stego-extension test
